llm2api.description: LLM2API — Gemma 4 E4B inference via Ollama. OpenAI-compatible chat completions API for AI agents and MCP workflows. Send a messages array and receive a response from Google Gemma 4 Edge 4B (gemma4:e4b). Supports streaming and non-streaming modes.

messages.description: Array of message objects with role and content. Roles: system, user, assistant.

stream.description: Enable streaming response (Server-Sent Events). Default false.

updf2md.description: Universal Markdown conversion endpoint for MCP tools and AI agents. It converts public PDF URLs or ticker symbols into agent-ready Markdown, returning OCR/layout metadata for PDFs and report context for ticker-based workflows.

mode.description: Optional mode selector: pdf or ticker.

pdf_url.description: Publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL of the PDF document to convert to Markdown.

ticker.description: Ticker, asset symbol, company name, or project name to turn into a Markdown investment report.

filename.description: Optional filename to send to the backend when the URL has no useful PDF name.

summary.description: Short summary returned for ticker-based report generation.

sources.description: Source URLs used for ticker-based report generation.

pdf_type.description: PDF classification such as text_based or scanned.

processing_time_ms.description: Time spent in the backend converter in milliseconds.

uimage.description: URL2AI ERNIE Image API for AI agents and MCP workflows. Generates an image from a direct prompt, text, a public URL, or an X post URL using ERNIE-Image-Turbo.

input_type.description: One of prompt, text, url, or x_post.

prompt.description: Direct image generation prompt. When input_type=prompt, this prompt is sent to the image backend as-is.

text.description: Direct text input for image generation.

url.description: Publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL to summarize into an image prompt.

tweet_url.description: X post URL when using x_post mode.

input_type.description: Resolved input type used for generation.

prompt.description: Final prompt sent to the image backend.

image_base64.description: Generated image bytes encoded as base64.

output_format.description: Image format such as png or jpeg.

oss2api.description:
OSS2API is a multi-skill AI agent gateway that wraps open-source tools into x402-ready paid endpoints. It exposes four skills under a single service — select a skill by appending its path after the service URL.

Skills:
  POST .../oss2api/image/remove-background
    Remove, replace, or blur the background of any image. Powered by imgly/background-removal-js (AGPL-3.0). Supply image_url or image_base64. Use mode=remove (transparent PNG), mode=replace (fill with background_color or background_image_url), or mode=blur (gaussian blur). Returns binary image or base64 JSON when response=json.

  POST .../oss2api/url/analyze
    Fetch a URL and extract structured content: title, description, headings (h1-h3), links, email/URL entities, and plain-text summary. Set format=markdown to get a Markdown rendering instead. Set depth=full for up to 8000 chars of body text.

  POST .../oss2api/url/browse
    Render a page with a real Chromium browser (Playwright) and return a screenshot or extracted text. Use action=screenshot (returns PNG as base64) or action=extract (returns visible text + links). Useful for JavaScript-heavy pages that static fetch cannot read.

  POST .../oss2api/url/scan
    Run a 3-phase security scan on any URL. Phase 1 checks HTTP security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy). Phase 2 does static HTML analysis for XSS sinks (innerHTML, eval, document.write), SQL error exposure, login form issues, SSRF-prone parameters, and external script count. Phase 3 sends findings to an Ollama AI model for additional vulnerability analysis and remediation recommendations. Returns a risk_score (0-100) and categorised findings (critical/high/medium/low/info).

url.description: [url/analyze, url/browse, url/scan] The target URL to fetch, browse, or scan. Must be an absolute http/https URL.

format.description: [url/analyze] Response format: json (default, returns structured fields) or markdown (returns Markdown rendering of the page body).

depth.description: [url/analyze] Content depth: basic (default, summary up to 600 chars) or full (returns up to 8000 chars of body text in content field).

action.description: [url/browse] Browser action: screenshot (default, returns PNG as base64) or extract (returns visible text and links).

wait_until.description: [url/browse] Playwright page load event to wait for: networkidle (default) or load.

image_url.description: [image/remove-background] Publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL of the source image.

image_base64.description: [image/remove-background] Base64-encoded source image (raw base64 or data URL).

mode.description: [image/remove-background] Processing mode: remove (default — transparent background), replace (solid color or image), blur (gaussian blur).

background_color.description: [image/remove-background, mode=replace] CSS color for the replacement background, e.g. #ffffff or rgba(0,0,0,0).

background_image_url.description: [image/remove-background, mode=replace] Public URL of a background image to composite behind the subject.

output_format.description: [image/remove-background] Output image format: png (default), webp, or jpeg.

response.description: [image/remove-background] Response mode: binary (default, raw image bytes) or json (returns {ok, image_base64, content_type}).

ok.description: true on success (url/* and image/* with response=json).

image_base64.description: [image/remove-background, response=json] Processed image encoded as base64.

content_type.description: [image/remove-background, response=json] MIME type of the returned image, e.g. image/png.

headings.description: [url/analyze] List of {tag, text} objects for h1–h3 headings.

links.description: [url/analyze, url/browse] List of {text, href} objects for absolute links found on the page.

summary.description: [url/analyze] Plain-text excerpt of the page body (up to 600 chars). [url/scan] One-sentence AI security assessment.

markdown.description: [url/analyze, format=markdown] Markdown rendering of the page content.

content.description: [url/analyze, depth=full] Full plain-text body up to 8000 chars. [url/browse, action=extract] Visible page text up to 8000 chars.

screenshot.description: [url/browse, action=screenshot] Base64-encoded PNG screenshot of the rendered page.

findings.description: [url/scan] Categorised findings: {critical, high, medium, low, info} — each an array of '[type] detail' strings.

findings_flat.description: [url/scan] All findings as flat '[SEVERITY/type] detail' strings.

actions.description: [url/scan] Recommended remediation actions generated by the AI analysis phase.
